body_txt: Short skirts are feminine, stylish, and cool in the summertime. But, as any girl will tell you, if you move around too much while wearing one it can be very hard to avoid creating Panty Shots . This is where Modesty Shorts come in. They let a girl run, jump, tumble, fight, climb ladders , or even fly without anybody catching a glimpse of her underwear. Other common variants include large puffy bloomers in non-period pieces, which are used as a bit of a fancier version, normally on more gothic characters. In Western works, spankies are worn for this purpose under cheerleading outfits, sometimes with tights or leggings. Another alternative is the skort , basically a pair of shorts covered by a skirt-like panel in the front. This trope is common in anime, as the skirts in girls' School Uniforms are almost always extremely short. It is often worn by Kick Chicks , Cheerleaders , Action Girls , Tomboys , or anyone else with an active lifestyle. It's also perfectly practical in real life . Compare Proper Tights with a Skirt . May be combined with Zettai Ryouiki . An alternative solution for this problem (in fiction, at least) is the Magic Skirt .
